do_not_merge.reason: Per-kind route rule: identity = base route id + service variant. Different variants never merge. route_m34-local-2011 has service_variant 'local', route_m34-sbs has service_variant 'sbs'. This is a strong identity field contradiction (test 1), forcing do_not_merge regardless of shared base route M34.

rationale: Both records explicitly declare their service variant in payload_identity_fields: local vs sbs. Per the Identity Merge Canon, routes with different service variants are distinct identities and must not be merged. The shared base route M34 is insufficient to overcome the variant difference. No additional context is needed to confirm the variant mismatch. [auto-accepted structurally per docs/identity-merge-canon.md; model confidence ignored]
